creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
I have just looked through  hidraw0 log again and concluded that this keyboard can not work with ukbd driver regardless of if ukbd patch has been applied or not. The device shares USB interface between keyboard and mouse and only one of them can attach to it. The winner is hardcoded to ums(4) driver. This is limitation of old USB HID support.
usbhid has no this limitation so if if works for you this PR can be closed again.
